reason: Maps to the original First Edition Ghost title that docks the Attack Shuttle; the SWX72 variant is the later Phantom II title.

candidates.Name: Ghost
candidates.Text:
Equip the Phantom title card to a friendly Attack Shuttle and dock it to this ship.

After you execute a maneuver, you may deploy it from your rear guides.

candidates.Name: Ghost
candidates.Text:
Equip the Phantom II title card to a friendly Sheathipede-class shuttle and dock it to this ship.

After you execute a maneuver, you may deploy it from your rear guides.

reason: Maps to the original First Edition Millennium Falcon title that adds the Evade action; the SWX57 variant is the later rotation-effect title.

candidates.Name: Millennium Falcon
candidates.Text: Your action bar gains the [Evade] action icon.

candidates.Name: Millennium Falcon
candidates.Text: After you execute a 3-speed bank maneuver ([Bank Left] or [Bank Right]), if you are not touching another ship and you are not stressed, you may receive 1 stress token to rotate your ship 180°.
